1: And hide not thyself from my supplication.
2: I mourn in my complaint, and make a noise;
3: And in wrath they hate me.
4: And the terrors of death are fallen upon me.
6: For then For then would I fly away, and be at rest.
7: And And remain in the wilderness. Selah. Selah.
8: From the windy storm and and tempest.
9: For I have seen violence and strife in the city.
10: Mischief also and sorrow are are in the midst of it.
11: Deceit and guile depart not from her streets.
12: Then I would have hid myself from him:
14: And And walked unto the house of God in company.
15: For wickedness is is in their dwellings, and and among them.
16: And the LORD LORD shall save me.
17: And he shall hear my voice.
18: For there were many with me.
19: Because they have no changes, therefore they fear not God.
21: His words were softer than oil, yet were were they drawn swords.
22: He shall never suffer the righteous to be moved.
23: But I will trust in thee.
